title: ajax minor var. nanus
intro: Ajax minor var. nanus, also known as Dwarf Ajax or Dwarf Mountain Ash, is a small deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bark and leaves, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and acting as a natural antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Ajax minor var. nanus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to digestive problems and skin conditions.
